_comment: OPTIONAL. References community/official MCP servers for Docker management. The docker skills work without any MCP server (via each tool's REST API / the Docker Engine API / compose files). Enable only the server(s) matching the control plane you use. Never commit real credentials — values come from the environment. Verify each launch command against the server's current README; packaging changes over time.

npm._comment: OUR OWN server (built in this repo at src/NpmMcp, distributed as a Native AOT binary via GitHub Releases). Manages nginx-proxy-manager directly: list/create/update/delete proxy hosts, certificates, redirects, and debug_routing. The launcher downloads the right per-arch binary on first run (no .NET runtime needed). Set NPM_URL (e.g. http://npm.lan:81), NPM_EMAIL, NPM_PASSWORD; NPM_VERIFY_SSL=0 for self-signed certs. SECRETS: rather than putting these in the env below or a dotfile, store them with `homelab-secret set NPM_PASSWORD` (homelab-core skill 'homelab-secrets') — if homelab-secret is on PATH the launcher auto-resolves any unset NPM_* from the OS secret store.

dockhand._comment: Primary. strausmann/mcp-dockhand exposes ~130 Dockhand tools. Distributed as a Docker image; the entry below runs it via docker. Adjust to your deployment (it can also run as a long-lived container exposing MCP over a port).

portainer._comment: Secondary. Official portainer/portainer-mcp. Match the package version to your Portainer version (e.g. ~=2.42).
